label: Extreme Uncertainty
description: Very high uncertainty for provider A (σ_q=0.18, σ_a=0.12) with strong risk aversion (ρ=2.0). Provider A has better nominal QoS, but its risk-adjusted utility is substantially lower. The uncertainty-aware policy clearly prefers provider B throughout the simulation, while the QoS-aware policy prefers A. Three degradation episodes make the relative advantage unmistakable.
